title: Fix JSON test grammar Version: 14 -> 15 to match ABI v15 target
description: In internal/testgrammars/json_language.go:353, the hand-compiled JSON test grammar sets Version: 14. The design doc (docs/design.md) states we target ABI version 15 only. This should be updated to Version: 15 so downstream code that checks this field behaves correctly. Quick one-line fix.
